## Profile description

What type of project would this profile support?

## Dimensions

- Workload: [e.g., backend-api, infra, shared-lib]
- Runtime: [e.g., typescript, python, go]
- Provisioner: [e.g., cdk, terraform, pulumi]
- Framework: [e.g., fastapi, express, none]

## Expected agents

Which agents should be loaded for this profile?

## Expected skills

Which skills should be included?

## Additional context

Any references, examples, or related profiles.
